assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard and inspect expanded dashboard agent blocks
steps.expected: Expanded blocks include stream rows for reasoning, tool calls ($-prefixed), tool results (indented), and errors for style verification
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded and two expanded blocks were present (Active Executive, Error Executive), but each block only contained header + metadata rows (role/adapter) with no stream transcript rows.

steps.action: Switch dashboard stream tabs and re-check content in expanded blocks
steps.expected: Pipeline/history views expose stream entries with all required content types
steps.observed: After selecting history and expanding Error Executive, body text still contained only metrics/agent metadata and no transcript lines (no reasoning/tool-call/tool-result rows).

steps.action: Run computed-style audit on expanded dashboard blocks
steps.expected: Reasoning uses --fg-muted, tool calls use --warn with $ prefix, tool results use --fg-dim with indentation, errors use --dead
steps.observed: Audit found expandedBlockCount=2 with toolCallLines=0, toolResultLines=0, reasoningLines=0 in both blocks. The only $-prefixed text on page was metric value '$0.00', not a tool-call row.

evidence.network: Captured polling + health requests in gui-detail-polish/round5-dashboard-stream/VAL-GUI-DASH-007-network.txt (e.g., GET /api/companies/{companyId}/live-runs, GET /api/heartbeat-runs/*/log, GET /api/health).

assertions.issues: Blocked: dashboard expanded agent blocks currently do not render stream transcript content needed to verify the color-coding contract for reasoning/tool-call/tool-result/error lines.

frictions.description: Initial network export returned no entries for this session.
frictions.resolution: Triggered explicit in-page fetch('/api/health') and re-exported network requests; capture then included dashboard polling endpoints.

frictions.description: Agent-browser interactive refs for agent names primarily map to sidebar navigation links, not dashboard row expanders.
frictions.resolution: Used scoped DOM click via eval on the dashboard 'Error Executive' row container to expand the target block for inspection.

blockers.description: No dashboard stream transcript rows are rendered in expanded agent blocks, so required line-type color checks are untestable on the real dashboard surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried pipeline/history tab switch, expanded multiple rows, and ran DOM audits; stream row count remained zero.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 0 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-GUI-DASH-007) due missing stream transcript content in expanded dashboard blocks.
